ksa_text: Conduct iterative AI risk assessment across the system lifecycle, including risk identification at inception, development-stage risk updates, deployment readiness evaluation, and post-deployment risk reassessment triggered by material changes or emerging risk signals.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of intelligence laws and regulations

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: task from AI Governance (affinity 0.30); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.5152). A Data Steward would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Steward whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
